label: ZaP experiment observes a long stable period coincident with sheared sub-Alfvenic flow

provenance.source_span: VOLUME 87, NUMBER 20 PHYSICAL REVIEW LETTERS 12 NOVEMBER 2001 Evidence of Stabilization in the Z-Pinch U. Shumlak, R. P. Golingo, and B. A. Nelson University of Washington, Aerospace and Energetics Resear

strengths: Anchors the graph in ZaP experimental quiescence rather than only theory.
weaknesses: Observed quiescence and shear coincidence do not by themselves prove the Atlas H3 mechanism.
